channel.title: Zander's Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily sales intelligence briefing for Zander Srodes at Reeco.
channel.itunes:author: Claude / Reeco Sales Intelligence

item.title: Daily Briefing — Wednesday, July 1
item.description: Meetings: Crescent/Adam Butts 11a (monthly touchpoint; RFP clock ticking, Avendra bundle is the play), Pipeline 1p, Drury check-in 2:30 internal, Ted Jabara/Meyer Jabara call 4p. Top 5: Kana Closed Won today, Crescent Avendra data-sharing status, Jabara Sage Intacct gate, Lexima+Sage Pilot 7/11 close, Vacatia follow-up overdue. Product: Payments Phase 1 live (M3+Corpay), AI PO match 80-90%, Avendra 344K items, Inventory module July.
item.itunes:summary: Meetings: Crescent/Adam Butts 11a (monthly touchpoint; RFP clock ticking, Avendra bundle is the play), Pipeline 1p, Drury check-in 2:30 internal, Ted Jabara/Meyer Jabara call 4p. Top 5: Kana Closed Won today, Crescent Avendra data-sharing status, Jabara Sage Intacct gate, Lexima+Sage Pilot 7/11 close, Vacatia follow-up overdue. Product: Payments Phase 1 live (M3+Corpay), AI PO match 80-90%, Avendra 344K items, Inventory module July.

item.title: Daily Briefing — Tuesday, June 30
item.description: Headline briefing (NotebookLM v2): Highgate $1.92M enters pipeline; Sage nears signature; product batch payments, offline price updates.
item.itunes:summary: Headline briefing (NotebookLM v2): Highgate $1.92M enters pipeline; Sage nears signature; product batch payments, offline price updates.
